title: Circuit Schedule Report
description: The final-circuit schedule: every circuit, its cable, breaker and load.

steps.title: Circuit schedule
steps.description: Each circuit with its cable size, breaker and load.
steps.voiceScript: This report schedules every final circuit with its cable, breaker and load.
steps.captionText: This report schedules every final circuit with its cable, breaker and load.
steps.fallbackMessage: Circuit schedule: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Cable and protection
steps.description: Sized from the design's loads and lengths.
steps.voiceScript: Cable sizes and protection are sized from the design's loads and runs.
steps.captionText: Cable sizes and protection are sized from the design's loads and runs.
steps.fallbackMessage: Cable and protection: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Print or download
steps.description: The schedule prints as a signed-off document.
steps.voiceScript: Print or download the circuit schedule for the installation file.
